creator: ehaupt@FreeBSD.org
text:
According to https://sourceforge.net/projects/xjadeo/files/xjadeo/ version 0.7.4 was released on Jun 27, 2013. The latest version is 0.8.7 from 10 days ago.

Could you maybe submit a more recent version? Is there a reason you're not building the QT5 GUI?

I've attached a modified version of your shar. Please use as a basis for further updates.
